video.title: Julian Alaphilippe secures the yellow jersey at Stage 4 of Paris-Nice

all_candidates.title: Julian Alaphilippe secures the yellow jersey at Stage 4 of Paris-Nice
Greipel sprints to victory at Stage 5 of the Paris-Nice

transcript.clean_text: in sending an email about Tony Galipan today. The auto corrects on the phone turned it into Tony Galloping. It might have been a Freudian by the phone, but it certainly got it right. He was galloping up the climb to Mombru. Julian Alfip fastest at the checkpoint. 26 seconds quicker at that point than Alberto Contidor. Could it be the youthful enthusiasm or the experience of Conidor that comes out on top 2158 the time of Alberto Conidor and it's Jilbear now coming through to the finish now Philip Jilbear 2257 53 seconds slower than Alberto Conidor so he's still in front of Contidor in the overall standings and Julian Ella Phillip whether he wins the stage or not he will certainly be ahead of Alberto Conidor in the overall but is he ahead of him on stage on as he is and by how much Julian Alfipe will be the stage winner and he will move into the yellow jersey it's just the calculator that comes out to work out the gaps as the saliva makes the gap between the chin and the knee Julian Alfid is all guns blazing The French are cheering and rightly so. He will change white for yellow. This has been an enormous ride by Julian Alfip. He will go to the top of the table. 18 seconds quicker than Gonador. That is quite a margin against one of the all-time greats. He was cautious in his own appraisal yesterday. Julian Ella Phipe. He said he just ride and enjoy himself.
